nasb.text: Then the tribes of Israel sent men through the entire tribe of Benjamin, saying, “What is this wickedness that has taken place among you?

esv.text: And the tribes of Israel sent men through all the tribe of Benjamin, saying, “What evil is this that has taken place among you?

cnv.text: 以色列各支派打發人到便雅憫的各家去，說：“你們中間怎麼發生了這樣的惡事呢？

ccb.text: 他们派人去对便雅悯各地的人说：“你们中间怎么发生了这种邪恶的事！
